name: German Chocolate Crinkle Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1 package Pillsbury Plus German chocolate cake mix
recipeInstructions:
-------------------------
Frosting:
1 cup Powdered sugar
2 ts Unsweetened cocoa
1 tbsp Soft margarine or butter
1-2 tbsp Milk
Combine the powdered sugar, unsweetened cocoa, and softened margarine in a bowl. Gradually add milk until smooth.
Heat oven to 350°F (175°C).
Combine first 7 ingredients; blend well. Stir in nuts. Let stand for 5 minutes.
Drop by rounded teaspoonfuls into sugar; gently toss until sugar coated. Place about 2 inches apart on ungreased cookie sheets.
Bake at 350°F for 8-10 minutes. (Cookies will be soft in center.) Cool for 1 minute, then remove from pans.
If desired, frost the cookies. Spread frosting evenly over cooled cookies.
Yield: 4 to 5 dozen.
High Altitude: Above 3,500 feet, bake at 375°F (190°C) for 10-12 minutes.
